prestazioni: Engine: Colombo Tipo 168/62 V12 (3.0L, 60° SOHC, 240-280 HP stock) – Full rebuild with forged Mahle pistons (9.5:1 CR), Carrillo H-beam connecting rods, and a billet crankshaft from GTO Engineering for 400+ HP reliability at 8,000 RPM.

Induction: Dual Weber 46 DCF3 carburetors (original spec) replaced with a custom-built fuel injection system by Fuel Injection Specialties (FIS), featuring Bosch Motorsport high-flow injectors (360cc/min) and a MoTeC M150 ECU for precise AFR control, paired with a custom 3.5" velocity stack intake manifold by Velocity Motorsports.

Exhaust: 3-into-1 stainless steel headers (equal-length, 1.75" primaries) by Capristo, merging into a 3.5" dual-wall exhaust system with a straight-pipe configuration and a valved bypass for track use, terminating in a pair of 4.5" titanium exhaust tips by Superformance.
estetica: Body: Full carbon fiber body conversion by RS Coachworks, including a one-piece front clip (replacing the original steel), lightweight aluminum doors (re-skinned with carbon fiber), and a custom carbon fiber hardtop with a removable Targa panel (inspired by the 250 GT SWB California).

Wheels: 16" Borrani wire wheels (original spec) replaced with custom 17x8" (front) and 17x10" (rear) magnesium wheels by BBS (RS-GT split-rim design), wrapped in Pirelli P Zero Corsa tires (225/45 ZR17 front, 285/40 ZR17 rear).

Aero: Custom front splitter and rear diffuser by APR Performance (250 California-specific molds), paired with a lightweight carbon fiber rear spoiler (30mm adjustable) by Vorsteiner, and a set of side skirts by Novitec (Ferrari 250 GT Lusso-inspired).
